title: Filtering by Target
summary: Use the --target flag to filter which markdown files get compiled based on a target field in YAML front matter.

title: QJS-MDC SVG without JS!
summary: In addition to rendering code blocks, mdc will render SVG charts from JSON or CSV data inside fenced code blocks.^svg-inline See Getting Started for the basic project setup before working with c

title: Getting Started

title: Setting Up a Markdown File
summary: A reference memo covering filename conventions and all front matter fields recognized by the pochade-blog compiler.
